creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
One file in the perforce distribution is newer than the distinfo
file. p4web is now from the 2000.11.3 and the distinfo and the
checksum is from 2000.10.30.
Seems to be a new version if i looked correctly with strings.

Fix: 

If the new version is okay (not tried myself), simply generate
a new checksum for it .
How-To-Repeat: Try a make checksum :-)
